final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: documentary street photography, editorial photo
Primary request: documentary-style street scene of morning ritual bathing in the Ganges River, Varanasi
Scene/backdrop: Ganges River at dawn, ancient ghats of Varanasi, wooden boats emerging from morning mist
Subject: devoted Hindu devotees performing ritual bathing, traditional attire, serene expressions, wooden rowboats
Style/medium: documentary street photography, photojournalistic, film grain texture
Composition/framing: wide environmental shot, 35mm lens, layered depth with foreground bathers and background boats
Lighting/mood: warm golden hour sunlight piercing through morning fog, soft diffused light, ethereal and spiritual atmosphere
Color palette: warm amber and gold tones, muted earthy browns, soft blue-gray mist
Materials/textures: weathered wooden boats, wet traditional fabrics, rippling water surface, stone ghats
Constraints: maintain authentic cultural atmosphere, keep the misty morning ambiance
Avoid: oversaturated colors, modern elements, plastic objects, deformed hands, artificial HDR look
